01 · About

Who I am

I'm a Software Engineer with 1.4 years of production experience building enterprise-grade healthcare software using Java, SQL, JavaScript, and modern web technologies. My work focuses on backend development, application security, database optimization, production support, and full-stack feature delivery.

At Advarra, I contributed to a large-scale Clinical Trial Management System used by over 1,000 research sites globally. I resolved production defects, implemented security fixes, optimized database workflows, and delivered enhancements across multiple release cycles while working in FDA and HIPAA-regulated environments.

Outside work, I build practical developer-focused applications including a Java-based National Identification Management System, a full-stack file conversion platform, a financial portfolio optimizer API, and real-time analytics dashboards. I care about clean code, strong fundamentals, secure design, and reliable software delivery.

"Reliable software is built through strong engineering fundamentals, secure design, and attention to detail."

03 · Experience

Work history

Software Engineer I

Mar 2025 — May 2026

Advarra — Enterprise Clinical Trial Management Platform

Java · Backend · Security · Production Engineering
  • Resolved 150+ production issues, defects, and enhancement requests across 6 release cycles, improving platform stability for 1,000+ research sites.
  • Remediated SQL Injection, SSRF, XXE, and Regex DoS vulnerabilities across enterprise CTMS modules handling sensitive clinical-trial workflows.
  • Investigated complex database consistency issues by reproducing workflows locally, validating records directly in SQL tables, and confirming fixes across test environments.
  • Implemented Java/JSP, SQL, and JavaScript fixes across Reviews, Subjects, Protocols, Specimen Management, and reporting modules.
  • Improved frontend performance by 40% by removing a legacy JavaScript dependency and replacing it with a cleaner native CSS approach.
  • Built business validations and workflow corrections for clinical review screens, including date validation, duplicate identifier checks, and character-counter behavior fixes.
  • Collaborated with QA, product owners, and senior engineers through Agile sprints, code reviews, developer testing, release validation, and technical documentation.
⟡ Enterprise Engineering Focus

Hands-on experience across Java-based enterprise modules, SQL-backed workflows, security remediation, production troubleshooting, and regulated healthcare software delivery.
